summary: 230 tests passed, 94.0% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: build_supervisor(test_config) returns a CompiledStateGraph without issuing any network request (verified by mock of the chat model's transport layer).
completion_promises.evidence: test_returns_compiled_state_graph verifies isinstance(graph, CompiledStateGraph) using the real create_deep_agent with test_config. test_no_network_calls_at_build_time patches init_chat_model and create_deep_agent, then asserts .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream were never called on the model mock.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Structural assertions pass: write_todos, virtual filesystem, and task tools appear in the compiled graph's tool inventory; execute does not; no custom tools; no subagents.
completion_promises.evidence: test_tools_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts tools=[] is explicitly passed as a keyword argument to create_deep_agent. test_subagents_kwarg_is_empty_list asserts subagents=[] is explicitly passed. test_system_prompt_is_imported_not_hardcoded uses AST parsing to verify SUPERVISOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT is imported from jarvis.prompts. test_system_prompt_passed_to_create_deep_agent verifies the formatted prompt is passed with {date} and {domain_prompt} resolved. Built-in tools (write_todos, filesystem, task) are provided by DeepAgents middleware automatically; execute is non-functional because default StateBackend does not implement SandboxBackendProtocol.

completion_promises.criterion_text: jarvis health can call build_supervisor(config) without consuming any provider tokens.
completion_promises.evidence: test_init_chat_model_called_with_config_supervisor_model verifies init_chat_model is called with config.supervisor_model (provider:model string). test_no_model_method_calls verifies no .invoke/.ainvoke/.stream/.astream/.predict calls on the model. The factory only instantiates the model and passes it to create_deep_agent — no LLM traffic.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Factory is idempotent-safe: calling it twice with the same config yields two independent graphs (no hidden global state).
completion_promises.evidence: test_two_calls_yield_distinct_objects calls build_supervisor twice with side_effect returning distinct mocks, asserts result_a is not result_b and call_count==2. test_no_global_state_leakage inspects module-level attributes and asserts no mutable (list/dict/set) public state exists. The only module constant is _PHASE1_DOMAIN_PROMPT (immutable string).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check and ruff format --check both pass with zero errors on src/jarvis/agents/__init__.py, src/jarvis/agents/supervisor.py, and tests/test_supervisor.py. test_supervisor_module_compiles and test_agents_init_compiles verify clean import. test_build_supervisor_has_type_annotations verifies type hints on the factory function.
